mapper.select: SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_input_info WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} ORDER BY input_sn
SELECT * FROM vr.tn_vr_input_info WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND input_sn = #{inputSn}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(input_sn), 0) FROM vr.tn_vr_input_info WHERE vr_id = #{vrId}
mapper.update: UPDATE vr.tn_vr_input_info SET doc_nm = #{docNm}, doc_se_cd = #{docSeCd}, file_id = #{fileId}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND input_sn = #{inputSn}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM vr.tn_vr_input_info WHERE vr_id = #{vrId} AND input_sn = #{inputSn}
